prompt: An overhead view blending the desk scene from Image 1 with a focus on computer graphics facial analysis. Show a laptop from Image 1 displaying visual data related to facial estimation of a person like the subject in Image 2, potentially in a retail context.
prompt_refined: Generate an overhead view of a wooden desk setup. The silver laptop from Image 1 should be positioned on the top-left of the desk, and the orange coffee cup and saucer from Image 1 should be on the mid-right. The laptop screen must display sophisticated visual data focused on computer graphics facial analysis. Specifically, depict an interface showing real-time facial estimation, such as a facial heatmap, emotion detection graph, or keypoint tracking applied to a human face. This analyzed face should resemble a person similar to the subject in Image 2, depicted within a retail store environment.
objects: Silver laptop on top-left of desk (from Image 1)
Orange coffee cup and saucer on mid-right (from Image 1)
Laptop screen displaying facial analysis interface
Real-time facial estimation data (e.g., facial heatmap, emotion detection graph, or keypoint tracking)
Human face being analyzed, resembling subject from Image 2
Retail store environment on laptop screen
